title: BurgerSwap - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by reentrancy attack on a decentralized exchange

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls swapExactTokensForTokens after a flash loan in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS swapExactTokensForTokens() IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING A FLASH LOAN IN THE SAME TRANSACTION
summary: BurgerSwap fell victim to a reentrancy attack using flash loans, allowing attackers to drain funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing reentrancy after a flash loan.
